purpose: Specifies the swarm completion phase: how the master detects all-done, the final report format, post-swarm metrics calculation written to metrics.json, automatic knowledge extraction (Step 17G) into the PKI insights/, and the user-facing summary. This phase converts a finished swarm into durable knowledge artifacts.
gotchas: Post-swarm knowledge extraction writes to {project_root}/.synapse/knowledge/insights/ -- one file per swarm
metrics.json is post-swarm-only; not updated incrementally during execution
patterns: Automatic knowledge harvesting from worker annotations and deviations
conventions: Final report includes per-wave timing, deviation counts, and links to relevant artifacts
